aico_store_locator.title: Store Locations Manager
aico_store_locator.intro: Edit the contact details, opening hours and images for your stores.
aico_store_locator.select_store: Select a location on the left to edit its details.
aico_store_locator.calendar_active_hint: Turn this off to hide opening hours from the storefront.
aico_store_locator.hours_hint: Up to 3 time ranges per day. Uncheck a day to mark it closed.
aico_store_locator.images_hint: Shown on your public store page. Lower order numbers appear first.
aico_store_locator.unsaved_body: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before leaving this page?

product.shipping_blocked_hint: Shipping is blocked for your account — you cannot add items to the cart.

size_guide.tooltip: International size chart — opens in a new tab.
size_guide.soon_tooltip: Size guide link is not available yet.

reviews.title: Customer reviews
reviews.demo_note: Demo data — reviews will load from a separate app once connected.
reviews.write_disabled_hint: Reviews are not connected to an API yet.
reviews.ai_generated: Generated by AI from customer reviews (illustrative)
reviews.ai_summary: Customers often mention the {title} for breathable comfort, the responsive Active sole, and how the silhouette holds up to long days. This summary is illustrative until the reviews service is live.
reviews.sample_title: Cool, modern shoe with the comfort you expect
reviews.sample_body: I have knee issues and Kybun shoes have been a great fit for me — this model feels light and supportive for daily wear.
reviews.sample_reply_body: Thank you for the kind words — we're glad the shoe is working well for you.

aico_pdp_message.select_quantity: Select at least one size first.

cart.title: Shopping cart
cart.fix_invalid_quantity_error: Could not adjust cart quantities. Please try again.

line.out_of_stock: Out of stock — remove this item or set quantity to 0.
line.quantity_exceeds_stock: Only {count} in stock — reduce the quantity to continue.
line.quantity_exceeds_stock_generic: Not enough stock for this quantity — reduce it to continue.

alerts.shipping_blocked: Shipping is currently blocked for your account. You cannot place an order — please contact your sales representative.
alerts.invalid_quantity: Some items in your cart are no longer fully in stock. Adjust the quantities below to proceed.
alerts.invalid_price: Some prices have changed since you added the items. Please review before checking out.
alerts.credit_limit_exceeded: Your cart total exceeds your available credit. Non-credit-card payments are unavailable at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.no_addresses: You don't have any saved addresses for this account. Add one from your profile to continue.
checkout.no_payment_methods: No payment methods are available for your account. Please contact your sales representative.
checkout.cc_fee_info: A processing fee applies to credit-card payments.
checkout.cc_disclaimer: When you click "Place order", you'll be redirected to our payment provider to complete the credit-card payment. Please do not reload or close this page.

discount.label: Discount code
discount.invalid: That discount code is not valid.

terms.label: I have read the {link}

errors.credit_limit: Your cart exceeds your credit limit. Choose a credit-card payment method, or reduce your cart total.
errors.cart_modified: Your cart has changed. Please review your items before continuing.
errors.submit_failed: We couldn't submit your order. Please try again or contact your sales representative.
errors.missing_fields: Choose a billing address, delivery address, and payment method to continue.

processing_page.title: Finalising your order
processing_page.body: We're confirming the payment with our processor. Please don't close this page — you'll be redirected automatically when it's done.
processing_page.fallback: Taking longer than expected? Check your inbox for an order-confirmation email or contact your sales representative.

thank_you.title: Thank you for your order
thank_you.email_confirmation: An order confirmation has been sent to you by email.

session.no_active: There is no active preorder window right now. Please check back later.

catalog.empty: No products available for this preorder.

reopen_notice.title: You've already placed a preorder for this address
reopen_notice.body: Your existing order will be opened. Quantities you've already ordered can't be reduced — but you can add more pairs at any time.

eligibility.title: This selection can't be used for a preorder
eligibility.intro: The following needs to be fixed before you can place a preorder:
eligibility.contact_support: Please contact support to resolve this.
eligibility.debtor_missing: No customer is selected for this preorder.
eligibility.debtor_missing_seller: The customer {label} has no seller assigned, so prices and currency can't be determined.
eligibility.debtor_missing_currency: No currency is configured for the delivery address {label}, so prices can't be calculated.
eligibility.missing_price_list: No price list is configured for the customer {label}, so product prices can't be calculated.
eligibility.delivery_address_invalid: The delivery address {label} is incomplete (no country set).
eligibility.billing_address_invalid: The billing address {label} is incomplete (no country set).
eligibility.tax_not_configured: VAT isn't configured for this shop.

summary.title: Summary
summary.terms_checkbox: I have read the General Terms and Conditions and agree with them.
summary.stock_warning: Cart will be adjusted to available quantity.
summary.committed_warning: Some lines are already confirmed and cannot be lowered.

thank_you.title: Thank you
thank_you.message: Your preorder has been submitted successfully.

aico_preorder.address_change_warning: Changing the address will reset your preorder cart.

confirmation.title: Thank you — your preorder is confirmed
confirmation.message: We have received your preorder and started processing it. A confirmation document is on its way.
confirmation.update_message: You did not place a new preorder — your existing preorder was updated. The new confirmation document replaces the previous one.
confirmation.pdf_unavailable: The confirmation PDF will be emailed to you shortly.

aico_exchange.title: Exchange platform
aico_exchange.not_available: Exchange Platform is currently not available in your country

intro.text1: On this platform, you can search specifically for a particular shoe—and another partner who has it in stock can offer it for sale directly.
intro.text2_before: If a request is accepted, both parties will receive an email containing each other's contact details. Here's how the exchange platform works:

form.title: Create new entry
form.empty_models: There are no models for the selected brand
form.empty_sizes: There are no sizes for the selected model
form.custom_color_message: Have you entered the color you are looking for?

table.request_not_found: The request you are looking for is no longer available

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.agreement_with_rules: By using the exchange platform, participating partners agree to all applicable rules and procedures.
terms.binding_offers: Accepted offers are binding and cannot be declined afterwards.
terms.contact_data_sharing: By using the exchange platform, partners expressly agree that their contact details will be transmitted to the other party upon confirmation of an exchange.
terms.gdpr_compliance: To facilitate a confirmed exchange, sharing both parties' contact information is necessary and will be carried out in accordance with applicable data protection regulations (GDPR).
terms.shipping_commitment: The offering party undertakes to ship the requested model within two business days.
terms.direct_transaction_disclaimer: Shipping and payment are handled directly between the partners. kybun Joya Retail AG is not involved in the transaction and assumes no liability.
terms.access_revocation: In the event of misuse or rule violations, kybun Joya Retail AG may revoke access to the exchange platform.

aico_exchange.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

aico_production_cockpit.title: Production Cockpit

intro.paragraph1: Here you will find a current overview of our production plans. This lets you see at any time when specific models will be reproduced and available again. This transparency helps you plan your orders optimally and ensure reliable availability for your customers.
intro.paragraph2: Please note that despite careful planning, unforeseen delays in the supply chain may occasionally occur, resulting in minor deviations.

table.no_data_for_brands: No products found for selected brands

brand_filter.title: Filter by brand
brand_filter.info: You can filter the list by selecting one or more brands. At least one brand must be selected.

aico_production_cockpit.error: Error loading restock data. Please try again later.

reminder_modal.toast_error: Failed to update reminders. Please try again.
reminder_modal.help_intro1: Select the sizes you want to be reminded about.
reminder_modal.help_intro2: For the changes to take effect you have to save the selected changes.

contact.title: Contact us anytime if you have any issues
